source_pr.title: planner: Keep view always select non-local-temporary table
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #25917 

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

When `buildDataSource`, check `builder.buildingViewStack` in build to determine wether building view or not. If it is true and infoschema is TemporaryTableAttachedInfoSchema, replace it with a underlying one. 

### Related changes

- N/A

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

Side effects

- N/A

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note
